prestazioni: Engine: F130E 4.0L V12 (Type F130B) with custom dry-sump lubrication system featuring a Hiflow Engineering billet aluminum oil pan and dual Moroso 22300 high-capacity oil pumps to prevent oil starvation during sustained 9,500 RPM endurance racing.

Forced Induction: Twin Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbos with custom 3D-printed Inconel 625 turbine housings (designed by TurboSmart for Ferrari’s unique exhaust manifold geometry) and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, paired with a custom Spearco 4.5" intercooler core (bar-and-plate, 22" x 12" x 4.5") and Vibrant Performance 14801 silicone couplers.

Fuel System: Full Motec M150 ECU with custom CAN bus integration for Ferrari’s Marelli IAW 16M ignition system, paired with a Radium Engineering dual-channel fuel surge tank (2.5L capacity) and twin Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, feeding ID1700x injectors and a custom billet aluminum fuel rail by Injector Dynamics.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon fiber body kit by APR Performance (333 SP-specific) including a 3-piece front splitter with integrated dive planes, rear diffuser with Gurney flap (adjustable via quick-release Dzus fasteners), and a fixed-position rear wing with dual-element airfoils (NACA 63A-012 profile) mounted on CNC-machined aluminum pedestals.

Wheels: OZ Racing Superforgiata 18x12" (front) and 18x13" (rear) in a custom gold-bronze finish, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (335/645R18 front, 345/680R18 rear) with TPMS sensors integrated into the valve stems via HRE Performance’s FlowForm technology.

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped cockpit by Sabelt, featuring a custom 6-point harness bar (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (330mm diameter, suede-wrapped) with integrated Motec C127 dash display, and a bespoke carbon fiber center console housing a Motec PDM15 power distribution module.
